title: Fletching Table
description: 6 new arrows and bows craftable in the fletching table.
body:
Use the fletching table to craft arrows and bows, along with new variants.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ZVvrUQ73rWo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Arrows
Replace flint with different materials to craft unique arrow variants.

![Crafting recipe for a slime arrow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca88d084630b05b617e6af4e3ca1fe4400c94afc.jpeg)

## Slime Arrow
Slime arrows will bounce off any block except a target block.

## Iron Arrow
Use an iron nugget to craft a heavy iron arrow. This arrow is slower, but deals more damage.

## Gold Arrow
Use a gold nugget to craft a more accurate gold arrow. This arrow does not shoot with any random variance.

## Torch Arrow
Use a torch to craft a torch arrow. This arrow will light up an area around it as it flies, and on the ground.

## Prismarine Arrow
Use a prismarine shard to craft this arrow. It flies underwater as if it was shot in the air.

## Amethyst Arrow
Use an amethyst shard to craft this arrow. It is faster than a regular arrow, and can travel further.

## Echo Arrow
Use an echo shard to craft this arrow. It will follow the nearest mob.

# Bows
Replace sticks with different materials to craft bows with unique textures and effects from Minecraft Dungeons.

![Using a twisting bow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec698977ffaf1d7795f9fe602d30db51d15616e9.jpeg)

## Weeping
Use weeping vines to craft a Weeping Bow. This bow is purely cosmetic.

## Twisting
Use twisting vines to craft a Twisting Bow. This bow is purely cosmetic.

## Bone
Use two bones and leather to craft a Bone Bow. This bow has more durability than a regular bow made of sticks.

## Wind
Use breeze rods to craft a Wind Bow. This bow has a wind burst effect when a critical hit is landed.

## Elite Power
Use copper ingots to craft an Elite Power Bow. This bow will always deal a critical hit.

## Void
Use two end rods and an eye of ender to craft a Void Bow. This bow will randomly teleport the target when a critical hit is landed.
